commands.review_summary:
The PR adds google-vertex image and video generation contracts, registers lazy google-vertex media providers, and routes Vertex image/video generation through Vertex-specific REST endpoints.

PR surface: Source +150, Tests +17. Total +167 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.1 register only google for Google image/video generation contracts, so an explicit google-vertex media candidate has no matching media provider without this class of fix.
